title: レースの中に、ドリームを

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's still some time before training. But just as
I sit down to review my data...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdyyy, Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You should've seen the look on your face! Guess
my little surprise was a success!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I knew ya wouldn't expect me outside of training
hours...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So I sped on over when your guard was down,
and—bang! Bull's-eye!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew... Job well done, if I do say so myself! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Is that really all she came here to do? I ask if she
has another reason for visiting...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: As a matter of fact, I do! I wanted to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Huh... What was it again?
choice_data_list: Maybe you ran so fast, it fell out of your head.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh well, ya know how it goes! I'll just ask ya when
it comes back to me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, since I'm here... How about gettin' an
early start on training?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My debut's right around the corner, so don't try
and stop me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle drags me to the track, with our
training session starting well ahead of schedule...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hm-hmm, I'm on my way... Me and Trainer
off to the racetrack... ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, who's that I spy over there?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy there, Air Groooove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gyah!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...You again, Taiki? How many times do I have to
tell you not to tackle me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Sorry 'bout that! You never seem to budge,
so I can't resist tryin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Guess I gotta give it a bit more oomph next time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You just don't know when to quit, do you?!
You've got some nerve...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh... At any rate, have you settled everything with your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: If you've got permission, let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Right... Permission. Uh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me you've forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We're supposed to be moving all the Umamusume
of the Year resources over to the library!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You said you needed to ask your trainer to adjust
your training schedule first and ran off!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, so that's what it was! It's all comin' back to
me!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's because I just explained everything to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'd feel a little bad leaving things this way, so I
decide to lend a helping hand.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Phew! There're more papers here than ya can
shake a stick at! Even with all three of us, we're
nowhere near finished!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Considering they concern every single
Umamusume of the Year since the title's
inception, it's understandable.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
These materials contain not only their individual
performance records, but detailed accounts of
their training regimens and opponents as well.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll be darned! That's those Umamusume of
the Year for ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
...What exactly is an "Umamusume of the Year,"
anyway?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You don't even know that?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... Every year, a select number of runners
from the Twinkle Series are bestowed a URA
award to commemorate their outstanding
performance.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The awards are divided into several divisions,
including one for classic-year runners, as well as
others for sprints and dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But only a single runner—one whose efforts
outshine all the others—can receive the honor of
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So basically... we're talkin' about a super
amazing Umamusume here?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Of course, the title has historically gone to
powerhouses with overwhelming talent... but
that's not the whole story.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whaddya mean?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The winners are preserved here in writing, their
names passed down for generations.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The stage of the Twinkle Series dazzles with tales
of past greats, ever woven into its history.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Mesmerized by its glamor, everyone longs to
stand on its turf.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To become a presence that ignites a burning
passion into the hearts of others—that's what it
means to be an Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once we finish collating the materials, Taiki and I
head out to train...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Guess what! I heard resources about all the
previous Umamusume of the Year have been
added to the library!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
What, seriously? We should go have a look, like,
right now!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I'll tell you all about who inspired me to get into
running!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What a nice smile that was. Shinin' so bright.
choice_data_list: That was the face of a dreamer.
That was the face of a dreamer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You said it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just by steppin' on the track, you can find your
dream...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And nothing makes us Umamusume or our fans
happier!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All right, that settles it! I know what I gotta do!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna become Umamusume of the Year!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I never expected to hear these words. It's a
statement that could easily be mistaken for any
one of her usual offbeat remarks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the glint in Taiki Shuttle's eyes tells me
otherwise. This time, she's serious.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can see it now—fantastic races, great
performances!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That's what I wanna show everybody...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: "Everybody" bein' my peers, fans, family, and friends! Everybody I know, and everybody I ever will know!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna make every single last one of 'em as
happy as possible!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki's fiery passion burns bright... and I won't shy
away from it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yeaaah! I'm markin' the title of Umamusume of
the Year as my new target!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a grand dream in her sights, Taiki Shuttle
takes her very first step forward!
